query: /* select#1 */ select `testdb`.`products`.`id` AS `id`,`testdb`.`products`.`name` AS `name`,`testdb`.`products`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`testdb`.`products`.`price` AS `price`,`testdb`.`products`.`stock` AS `stock`,`testdb`.`products`.`created_at` AS `created_at` from `testdb`.`products` where ((`testdb`.`products`.`price` < 100.00) and (`testdb`.`products`.`stock` > 50))

inputs.operation: Index range scan on products using idx_price over (price < 100.00), with index condition: (products.price < 100.00)
